    de.uka.ilkd.key.java
    This package contains classes that cover the Java programming language.
    de.uka.ilkd.key.java.recoderext  

    • Uses of KeYProgModelInfo in de.uka.ilkd.key.java

      Methods in de.uka.ilkd.key.java that return KeYProgModelInfo 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      KeYProgModelInfo KeYProgModelInfo.copy() 
      KeYProgModelInfo JavaInfo.getKeYProgModelInfo()
      returns the underlying KeYProgModelInfo providing access to the Recoder structures.
      Constructors in de.uka.ilkd.key.java with parameters of type KeYProgModelInfo 
      Constructor and Description
      JavaInfo(KeYProgModelInfo kpmi, Services s)
      creates a new JavaInfo object by giving a KeYProgModelInfo to access the Recoder SourceInfo and using the given Services object.
